manifest.name: Local Sync

name: Local Sync

releases.author: liuboacean
releases.description:
## ✨ 新特性

- 🔍 **同步历史查看器 — 分类筛选**：按日志级别（调试/信息/成功/警告/错误）与事件类型（文件已推送/已连接/同步完成…）筛选，与路径/日期/快捷筛选 AND 组合
- 🌐 **日志全面中文化（含 DEBUG 级）**：补齐 32 处 `debugLog` 翻译 + 2 处收尾修正；保留技术 token（WS/WSS/TLS/UDP/CRDT/port/deviceId）与 `[ObsSync]`/`[Obsidian Local Sync]` 前缀
- 📝 **差异预览（Diff Preview）**：同步前预览文本/Markdown 差异（`diff-preview-modal.ts` + `diff-preview-service.ts`）

## 📈 质量

- 构建与 `tsc` 类型检查零错误；测试 **239 / 239** 通过（新增 10 个筛选单测）
- 无破坏性变更，`minAppVersion` 保持 `1.6.6`

## 📦 安装

下载 `main.js` / `manifest.json` / `styles.css`，放入 vault 的 `.obsidian/plugins/local-sync/` 并启用插件。

releases.description:
## v1.1.5

Same codebase as v1.1.4 — all fixes already applied:

- Replaced Vault.delete() with FileManager.trashFile()

releases.author: liuboacean
releases.description:
## v1.1.4

### Fixes
- Fixed 58 TypeScript compilation errors
- Eliminated all @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-* ESLint warnings
- Replaced Vault.delete() with FileManager.trashFile() per community review
- Added missing crypto import in protocol.ts
- Added .eslintrc.json for community review compliance

### Changed
- Bumped minAppVersion to 1.6.6 (required for FileManager.trashFile)

### Quality
- ESLint warnings: 0
- TS errors: 0
- Tests: 148/148 passing
- Build: passes

### Assets
- main.js (compiled plugin)
- manifest.json
- styles.css
releases.name: v1.1.4

releases.author: liuboacean
releases.description:
## v1.1.2 — Community review fixes

### Fixes
- **Remove `rejectUnauthorized: false`** — security compliance (no SSL verification bypass)
- **Bump `minAppVersion` to 1.5.11** — supports `FileManager.trashFile()` and `setCta()`
- **Replace `setDestructive()` with `setCta()`** — compatible with 1.5.11
- **Restore `FileManager.trashFile()`** — respects user deletion preference
- **Fix `addButton` callback syntax** — proper closure in setting-tab.ts
releases.name: v1.1.2

releases.author: liuboacean
releases.description:
## v1.1.1 — Community review fixes

### Fixes
- Revert `trashFile()` to `Vault.delete()` for `minAppVersion 1.4.0` compatibility
- Remove `.setCta()` from reset button (API too new for declared minAppVersion)
- `ws` import via local CJS shim (avoids `require()` lint warning + wrapper.mjs issue)
- Fix `as any` cast in WebSocket client options
releases.name: v1.1.1

releases.author: liuboacean
releases.description:
## v1.1.0 — TLS Encryption

### New Features
- **TLS 加密传输**: 所有同步流量默认走 WSS 加密通道
- **自动证书生成**: 首次启动自动生成 ECDSA P-256 自签名证书
- **证书指纹展示**: 设置页显示当前证书 SHA-256 指纹
- **证书重置**: 一键重新生成证书
- **TLS 降级兼容**: WSS 连接失败自动降级到明文（可配置）
- **零新增依赖**: 全部使用 Node.js 内置模块

### Technical Details
- ECDSA P-256 key pair via `crypto.generateKeyPairSync`
- Self-signed X.509v3 certificate via hand-crafted ASN.1 DER encoding
- WSS via `https.createServer({ key, cert })` → `WebSocketServer({ server })`
- SHA-256 fingerprint exchange for PIN verification

### Tests
- 17 new TLS tests (cert-manager: 8, WSS connection: 5, protocol: 4)
- 148/148 tests passing
releases.name: v1.1.0 — TLS Encryption

releases.author: liuboacean
releases.description:
## v1.0.9

### Fix
- Revert `FileManager.trashFile()` to `Vault.delete()` — `trashFile()` requires a higher `minAppVersion` than 1.4.0
- Deduplicate eslint-disable comment lines
releases.name: v1.0.9

releases.author: liuboacean
releases.description:
## v1.0.8

Same fixes as 1.0.7 — version bump to resolve release matching issue:

### Fixes
- **handleRemoteBatch timeout**: Added 5s per-file timeout to prevent sync hanging
- **ws CJS compatibility**: Changed import to require() for esbuild bundling
- **Community review feedback**: trashFile, window.setTimeout, eslint descriptions
releases.name: v1.0.8

releases.author: liuboacean
releases.description:
## v1.0.7

### Fixes
- **handleRemoteBatch timeout**: Added 5s per-file timeout to prevent sync hanging
- **ws CJS compatibility**: Changed import to require() for esbuild bundling
- **Community review feedback**:
  - Use `window.setTimeout`/clearTimeout for popout window compat
  - Use `trashFile()` instead of `Vault.delete()` for user deletion preference
  - Add description to eslint-disable comment
releases.name: v1.0.7

releases.author: liuboacean
releases.description: Final cleanup: fresh release with all fixes
